title: Toma (YC W24) is hiring a Senior/Staff Eng to build AI automotive coworkers
full_text:
About this Role

We’re looking for a Senior or Staff Software Engineer to own the technical direction on our engineering team, mentor other engineers, and partner closely with product and design to deliver fast, reliable, and magical user experiences. This role is deeply hands-on. You’ll be writing and reviewing code daily, shaping architecture, and helping scale our platform as we grow.

What you will do

Lead the architecture, implementation, and delivery of user-facing products (dashboard, real-time voice AI, support tooling)

Write high-quality, production-grade TypeScript across the stack (Next.js, Bun)

Mentor and guide engineers through code reviews, design discussions, and technical planning

Collaborate directly with Product and Design to align on priorities and execute quickly

Partner with other pods to integrate intelligent features into the product experience

Drive engineering velocity while maintaining reliability and system health

Work closely with customers to translate their feedback into scalable product improvements

Preferred Qualifications

Experience in TypeScript, low-level Node.js (Bun), T3 Stack (Next.js, React, Prisma, PostgreSQL, NextAuth, tRPC)

6+ years of experience building and scaling full-stack web applications

Experience leading projects or teams in fast-paced environments

Care about craft and speed (you can move quickly without compromising on quality)

Desire to continuously learn

Don’t think you meet all the qualifications? Apply anyway. We’d love to hear what excites you about us, and we may have a role that's a good fit for you.

Benefits

Unlimited AI tokens

MacBook Pro 16" M4 Max (or newest high-end equivalent)

Free daily in-office lunch and dinners

Competitive salary with meaningful equity

Free health, dental, and vision insurance

Weekly team outings and customer visits

Unlimited PTO
